The '''primary office''' of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] was located within the old [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
Occupying a chamber deep within the heart of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the office of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] served as the primary chambers used by the Republic's leader. With [[Color/Legends|red]]-hued walls and "windows" which presented real time [[Hologram/Legends|holoimages]] from the outside, the office was occupied by two different Chiefs during its use.<ref name="CATCW" /> From this office Chief [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] briefed agents [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] prior to their [[Battle of Artus Prime|deployment]] to [[Artus Prime]].<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref> Later, Chief [[Borsk Fey'lya]] would come to occupy the office until his death and the office's destruction in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Ironically, the expansive windows and red color scheme of Mon Mothma's office bore a passing resemblance to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Chancellor's Suite/Legends|Executive Office]].
